headline: A Look At FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Valuation After A Steep 1 Year Share Price Pullback
summary: Why FactSet Research Systems (FDS) is on investors’ radar now FactSet Research Systems (FDS) has drawn attention after a sustained pullback, with the stock down about 23% year to date and roughly 48% over the past year, sharpening focus on its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for FactSet Research Systems.
